overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a black muscle car driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates multi-lane streets lined with towering holographic billboards, elevated highways, and futuristic commercial buildings while light rain creates reflective wet surfaces on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane cyberpunk commercial boulevard with holographic billboards

events.description: vehicle executes right turn at intersection onto main arterial road
approaching and entering shadow of elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating from crosswalk through intersection and cruising along wet neon-lit streets in a black muscle car

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane
silver sedan passing on the left side

entered.detail: tall commercial building featuring large 'EL GUAPO' digital billboard with skull graphic
row of high-rise buildings with bright neon signage and illuminated windows
towering futuristic skyscraper with multiple levels of advertisements visible in the distance
ground floor storefronts with glowing awnings and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the black muscle car accelerating from a yellow crosswalk into a wide cyberpunk boulevard. The EL GUAPO building dominates the right side while neon-lit commercial towers line the left. The vehicle makes a smooth right turn around 3.5 seconds and continues driving through the rain-slicked streets, approaching an elevated highway structure that casts shadows ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath elevated highway with concrete support columns

events.description: entering shadow of massive concrete overpass, ambient light drops significantly
exiting covered overpass area back into open neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the darker covered section of roadway

notable_agents.action: black truck driving parallel in the left lane

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support columns creating a tunnel-like effect
large illuminated sign reading 'CITY CENTER' suspended from the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a darker, sheltered section beneath a massive concrete overpass around 15 seconds, with artificial lighting becoming dominant. The CITY CENTER sign hangs overhead as the car drives through the tunnel-like space. Around 22 seconds, the car emerges back into the open, revealing palm trees and the continuation of the neon-lit commercial district ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with elevated pedestrian walkways and holographic displays

events.description: passing under the city center archway into the densest commercial area
navigating through busy intersection with cross traffic and multiple vehicles

agents.ego_description: cruising through the urban canyon surrounded by towering advertisements and dense architecture

notable_agents.action: white sports car overtaking on the right side
blue sedan waiting at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: decorative illuminated archway marking the entrance to the city center district
large floating digital advertisements including 'WNS' news and product displays
pedestrian bridge connecting two commercial buildings overhead with glass sides
tall palm trees visible between buildings indicating coastal city environment

segments.scene_description: Driving through the heart of the city center, the car passes under a decorative archway at 28 seconds. Holographic billboards float above the street on the right, while an elevated pedestrian walkway spans the road ahead. The vehicle navigates a busy intersection around 35 seconds, sharing the road with moderate traffic including a white sports car that overtakes on the right. Palm trees are visible in the distance between the dense commercial towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial with frequent overpasses and commercial signage

events.description: executing right turn at intersection onto narrower street
entering covered section beneath another overpass with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, slowing for turn, then accelerating into narrower street section

notable_agents.action: red car ahead braking for the intersection

entered.detail: building facade with large vertical yellow warning banners and black text
suspended traffic lights and directional signs spanning the multi-lane road
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the urban arterial, passing buildings with prominent yellow warning banners on the right. Around 45 seconds, the car makes a right turn at an intersection, navigating around a red car ahead. After the turn, the street becomes narrower and the vehicle enters another covered section beneath an overpass at 50 seconds, with concrete support walls closing in on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street under continuous overpass with close building walls

events.description: navigating sharp right turn into more enclosed street section
entering deeply shadowed area under continuous overpass coverage

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through narrow streets with walls close on both sides, maintaining speed under overpass

notable_agents.action: white car parked along the left curb

entered.detail: illuminated blue medical cross symbol indicating hospital or clinic facility
tall building facades immediately adjacent to the narrow street creating a canyon effect
unbroken concrete overhead structure completely covering the roadway
ground floor shops with illuminated signs and entryways along the narrow street

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the car driving through increasingly narrow and enclosed urban streets. A blue medical cross sign is visible on the right as the vehicle makes another right turn around 60 seconds. The street becomes a covered roadway with building walls pressing close on both sides and a continuous concrete canopy overhead. The artificial lighting creates deep shadows as the car continues through this confined commercial corridor toward the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a black muscle car as it navigates a rain-soaked cyberpunk boulevard, transitioning from open neon-lit streets through a sheltered underpass and back into a dense commercial heart. It begins with the vehicle accelerating from a yellow crosswalk past the towering EL GUAPO building before making a smooth right turn into the rain-slicked city. As the car continues, the environment shifts into a darker, sheltered section beneath a massive concrete overpass where artificial lighting dominates under a CITY CENTER sign. The scene then opens back into the light, passing palm trees and a decorative archway while holographic billboards float above the street. Finally, the camera follows the car through a busy intersection shared with other traffic, moving toward a horizon of dense commercial towers and distant greenery.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a wide urban arterial into an increasingly claustrophobic and enclosed commercial corridor. It begins by cruising past buildings adorned with yellow warning banners before the car makes a right turn at an intersection, navigating around a red vehicle. As the car proceeds, the environment shifts from open streets to a narrower passage beneath a concrete overpass where support walls begin to close in on both sides. The scene then tightens further as the vehicle passes a blue medical cross sign and turns right once more, entering a covered roadway. Finally, the camera follows the car deep into a confined corridor where building walls and a continuous concrete canopy overhead create a tunnel of deep shadows and artificial light.
